parameters.text: ={{ ($json.error || 'Command not recognized.') + ' Available commands: approve <run_id> reject <run_id> edit <run_id> <requested changes>' }}

={{
[
  'Invoice #' + $('Edit: Normalize Revised Email').first().json.registry.invoice_number + ' email was revised and is ready for review.',
  '',
  'Change summary: ' + ($('Edit: Normalize Revised Email').first().json.edit_entry.change_summary || 'updated email draft'),
  'Blocked changes: ' + (
    (($('Edit: Normalize Revised Email').first().json.edit_entry.blocked_changes || []).length)
      ? $('Edit: Normalize Revised Email').first().json.edit_entry.blocked_changes.join('; ')
      : 'none'
  ),
  '',
  'Recipients: ' + (
    Array.isArray($('Edit: Normalize Revised Email').first().json.registry.email_to)
      ? $('Edit: Normalize Revised Email').first().json.registry.email_to.join(', ')
      : String($('Edit: Normalize Revised Email').first().json.registry.email_to || '')
  ),
  'Subject: ' + ($('Edit: Normalize Revised Email').first().json.registry.email_subject || ''),
  '',
  $('Edit: Normalize Revised Email').first().json.registry.email_body || '',
  '',
  'Reply with:',
  'approve ' + $('Edit: Normalize Revised Email').first().json.registry.run_id,
  'reject ' + $('Edit: Normalize Revised Email').first().json.registry.run_id,
  'edit ' + $('Edit: Normalize Revised Email').first().json.registry.run_id + ' <requested changes>'
].join('\n')
}}

values.content:
=You revise invoice email drafts for Guilherme inside an n8n workflow.

Return only valid minified JSON. Do not use Markdown.

Current invoice registry:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.registry, null, 2) }}

User feedback:
{{ $json.feedback }}

Rules:
- Follow the user's requested edit when safe.
- You may change recipients, tone, subject, and email body.
- Keep the email professional and concise.
- Preserve the invoice number exactly.
- Do not change amount, hours, rate, period, draft file, PDF file, or invoice number.
- Do not mention AI, automation, validation, confidence, approval, Productive.io, or internal workflow details.
- Do not invent links or attachment names.
- If the user asks to change financial values, invoice number, or PDF content, add that request to blocked_changes and keep the email safe.
- The revised email is not sent automatically; it will be sent back to Guilherme for another review.

Return exactly this JSON shape:
{"action":"send_review","email_to":["recipient@example.com"],"email_cc":[],"email_bcc":[],"email_subject":"Invoice #000","email_body":"email body","change_summary":"short summary","blocked_changes":[]}

additionalFields.caption:
={{
'Invoice #' + $json.invoice_number + ' is ready for review.\n\n' +

'Invoice details\n' +
'Period: ' + $json.invoice_sheet_data.period_label + '\n' +
'Hours: ' + $json.current_invoice_data.total_hours + '\n' +
'Rate: ' + $json.current_invoice_data.currency + ' ' +
$json.current_invoice_data.hourly_rate + '/h\n' +
'Amount: ' + $json.current_invoice_data.currency + ' ' +
$json.current_invoice_data.amount + '\n\n' +

'Email draft\n' +
'Subject: ' + $json.current_invoice_data.email_subject + '\n\n' +
$json.current_invoice_data.email_body + '\n\n' +

'Reply later with:\n' +
'approve ' + $json.run_id + '\n' +
'reject ' + $json.run_id + '\n' +
'edit ' + $json.run_id + ' <requested changes>'
}}

nodes.name: Recover invoice data and append PDF draft

parameters.jsonOutput:
{
  "email_review_knowledge_base": {
    "allowed_client_names": [
      "X",
      "Y"
    ],
    "good_examples": [
      {
        "label": "standard attached invoice email",
        "subject": "Invoice #016",
        "body": "Hi X and Y,\n\nI hope this email finds you well.\n\nPlease find attached Invoice #016 for the services provided. Thank you for your time.\n\nBest Regards,\nGuilherme"
      },
      {
        "label": "standard sending invoice email",
        "subject": "Invoice #016",
        "body": "Hi X and Y,\n\nI hope this email finds you well.\n\nI am sending Invoice #016 for the services provided. Thank you for your time.\n\nBest Regards,\nGuilherme"
      }
    ],
    "required_elements": [
      "greeting addressed to X and Y",
      "exact invoice number in subject",
      "exact invoice number in body",
      "short professional body",
      "Best Regards, Guilherme sign-off"
    ],
    "forbidden_client_email_terms": [
      "hours",
      "hourly rate",
      "rate",
      "amount",
      "billing period",
      "period",
      "AI",
      "automation",
      "validation",
      "approval",
      "confidence",
      "detected issues",
      "Productive.io",
      "time entries",
      "invoice draft",
      "work summary",
      "activities performed"
    ],
    "bad_patterns": [
      "wrong recipient or extra recipient",
      "offensive or informal language",
      "missing invoice number",
      "mentions internal workflow details",
      "mentions financial totals or hours",
      "too verbose or includes work activity summary",
      "missing sign-off"
    ]
  }
}

values.content:
=You are the Draft Agent in an n8n invoice workflow.

Return only one valid JSON object. Do not use Markdown, code fences, or explXtions.

Your job is to draft only the external client email. Do not validate the invoice and do not decide whether to send it.

Input payload:
{{ JSON.stringify($json, null, 2) }}

Rules:
- Use the invoice number exactly as provided: Invoice #{{ $json.source.invoice_number }}.
- Address the email to X and Y.
- Keep the email short, professional, and close to the good examples in the knowledge base.
- Do not mention hours, hourly rate, amount, dates, period, Productive.io, time entries, AI, automation, validation, approval, confidence, detected issues, work summary, or internal workflow details.
- Do not invent links, filenames, extra recipients, or work performed.
- If reviewer_feedback is present, apply it.

Return exactly this JSON shape:
{"email_to":["recipient@example.com"],"email_cc":[],"email_bcc":[],"email_subject":"Invoice #000","email_body":"email body","draft_notes":"short note about what changed"}

=You are the Reviewer Agent in an n8n invoice workflow.

Return only one valid JSON object. Do not use Markdown, code fences, or explXtions.

Your job is to review the Draft Agent output using the invoice data, recipient policy, and knowledge base. You do not send email and you do not change financial values.

Review payload:
{{ JSON.stringify($json, null, 2) }}

Classify the draft as:
- accepted: good enough for Guilherme to review.
- retry: fixable issues; give precise reviewer_feedback for the next draft.
- manual_review: repeated or ambiguous issues that should go to Guilherme.
- stop: unsafe issue such as offensive language, unauthorized recipient, missing invoice number, or severe malformed data.

Required checks:
- recipient_match: recipients are allowed by recipient_policy.
- invoice_number_present: subject and body include exact Invoice #.
- professional_tone: concise and professional.
- forbidden_terms_absent: no forbidden client-email terms from the knowledge base.
- format_valid: greeting, body, and Best Regards/Guilherme sign-off.
- offensive_language: true only if offensive or inappropriate wording is present.

Return exactly this JSON shape:
{"review_status":"accepted|retry|manual_review|stop","score":0.0,"confidence":"high|medium|low","detected_issues":["issue"],"checks":{"recipient_match":true,"invoice_number_present":true,"professional_tone":true,"forbidden_terms_absent":true,"format_valid":true,"offensive_language":false},"review_feedback":"specific instructions for the next draft","recommended_action":"request_approval|needs_manual_review|stop","accepted_email_subject":"Invoice #000","accepted_email_body":"email body"}

- stop: unsafe issue such as offensive language, unauthorized recipient, missing invoice number, or severe malformed data.

Required checks:
- recipient_match: recipients are allowed by recipient_policy.
- invoice_number_present: subject and body include exact Invoice #.
- professional_tone: concise and professional.

- offensive_language: true only if offensive or inappropriate wording is present.

Return exactly this JSON shape:
{"review_status":"accepted|retry|manual_review|stop","score":0.0,"confidence":"high|medium|low","detected_issues":["issue"],"checks":{"recipient_match":true,"invoice_number_present":true,"professional_tone":true,"forbidden_terms_absent":true,"format_valid":true,"offensive_language":false},"review_feedback":"specific instructions for the next draft","recommended_action":"request_approval|needs_manual_review|stop","accepted_email_subject":"Invoice #000","accepted_email_body":"email body"}

parameters.text:
={{ 'Invoice #' + $json.invoice_number + ' needs manual review before generating the draft.

Issues: ' + (($json.detected_issues || []).length ? $json.detected_issues.join('; ') : 'none') + '

Email subject: ' + ($json.email_subject || '') + '

' + ($json.email_body || '') }}

nodes.name: Drive: Update AI Manual Review Registry

meta.note: Two-agent invoice email drafting/review workflow with up to 3 draft-review attempts before manual review.
